mncDwgBase.Description: Base of various blocks and drawings
mncDwgBase.FullDescription: The dwg database allows you to insert both blocks and finished drawings (for example, details view). The dwg database is filled with users. Plugin requires access to the internet
mncDwgBase.h1: Sending user blocks and drawings to the modplus.org server
mncDwgBase.h10: Add a new item to the local database
mncDwgBase.h11: Auxiliary methods for managing the user base
mncDwgBase.h15: You can scale and pan the image with the mouse wheel
mncDwgBase.h27: Specify one or more files from your dwg database. Plugin will archive these files and create an index file for the items stored in these files
mncDwgBase.h29: Elements that are stored in the file:
mncDwgBase.h32: You can leave a comment on the archive and we will pay attention to it
mncDwgBase.h39: Select a block in the current drawing
mncDwgBase.h43: Dwg-file into which the block will be copied
mncDwgBase.h45: Check if the specified block is three-dimensional
mncDwgBase.h47: The name of the block that is displayed in the plugin window
mncDwgBase.h51: If there is no normative document, just leave the field blank
mncDwgBase.h53: Who added the block to the dwg database
mncDwgBase.h58: Take attribute values from the block
mncDwgBase.h67: What do you want to add?
mncDwgBase.h72: Video instruction for working with the database
mncDwgBase.h74: Please leave an email address, a link to a VK page, Facebook, Telegram or other options for contacting you. Your contacts may be needed to inform you if the blocks (drawings) you send need to be adjusted
mncDwgBase.h75: You did not specify contacts for feedback. If the blocks (drawings) you send need adjustment, then we will not be able to inform you about it!\nCollect archive anyway?
mncDwgBase.h77: The path to the folder where the dwg user base is located
mncDwgBase.h78: Specify the path to the dwg user base storage folder
mncDwgBase.h79: Restore default value of path to dwg user base storage folder
mncDwgBase.msg1: ModPlus database file pointer is not found!\nClose nanoCAD and run the update check by the auto-update module
mncDwgBase.msg3: The user database file pointer was not created. Create?
mncDwgBase.msg4: The source file is missing! Download?
mncDwgBase.msg6: There is no access to the internet or modplus.org!\nPlease try again later
mncDwgBase.msg9: However, dwg-files will not be deleted
mncDwgBase.msg11: The selected item will be removed from the database
mncDwgBase.msg15: You have not selected any files to archive!
mncDwgBase.msg17: Collection of required items from the database
mncDwgBase.msg19: The file is ready to be sent
mncDwgBase.msg21: Perhaps you have an archive opened
mncDwgBase.msg22: Could not find the file to send. Perhaps you deleted it?
mncDwgBase.msg23: There is no access to the internet or modplus.org!
mncDwgBase.msg25: Uploading a file to the server
mncDwgBase.msg28: was sent to the modplus.org server
mncDwgBase.msg29: Once the file is verified, we will add its contents to the public database
mncDwgBase.msg31: Could not delete archive! Maybe it's open at the moment
mncDwgBase.msg32: Add a block with such data?
mncDwgBase.msg33: Could not copy the selected block to the specified file
mncDwgBase.msg34: Select block to add to database
mncDwgBase.msg35: The plugin dwg database contains a block named
mncDwgBase.msg36: Error parsing the file-pointer of plugin database!
mncDwgBase.msg37: The dwg user database contains a block named
mncDwgBase.msg38: Error parsing the file-pointer of user database!
mncDwgBase.msg39: Specify the display name of the block
mncDwgBase.msg40: Specify the path in the catalog
mncDwgBase.msg41: Check the "Current file" for dwg-file, however, the current file is not located in the directory dwg-base!
mncDwgBase.msg44: Perhaps the current file has not been saved yet!
mncDwgBase.msg45: Check the "Current file" for dwg-file, however, it failed to recognize the current location of the file directory
mncDwgBase.msg46: Specify the dwg file to copy the block
mncDwgBase.msg47: Selecting a file to add a block
mncDwgBase.msg49: The specified file must be located in a subfolder of the folder
mncDwgBase.msg50: Create a new dwg database file
mncDwgBase.msg51: Do not create a file in the root of the
mncDwgBase.msg53: Attention! The selected block is dynamic! The attributes for the specification are counted for one instance of the block!\nIf the block has several visibility options, then working with such a block will be confusing!
mncDwgBase.msg54: The current values of the attributes are filled with the default values specified when the block was created\nIf you continue, the values of the attributes will be filled with values from the selected block insert!\nGet the values of the attributes from the selected block insert?
mncDwgBase.msg55: The current file is not located in the dwg-database directory!
mncDwgBase.msg56: Unable to recognize the location directory of the current file
mncDwgBase.msg58: Save the entered data as "Last entered data"?
mncDwgBase.msg59: Selecting a drawing to add to the database
mncDwgBase.msg60: The selected file contains proxy objects and can not be added to the database!\nDelete all proxy objects and try again
mncDwgBase.msg61: Specify the folder to copy the selected file
mncDwgBase.msg62: In the specified folder there is already a file
mncDwgBase.msg65: The selected folder should be in the subfolder of the folder
mncDwgBase.msg66: Add a drawing with such data?
mncDwgBase.msg67: The plugin database contains a drawing with the name
mncDwgBase.msg68: The user database contains a drawing with the name
mncDwgBase.msg69: Specify a display name for the drawing
mncDwgBase.msg70: Specify the dwg file for the drawing
mncDwgBase.r1: The default plugin assumes that the blocks added to the local (user) database will be added to the global database that is available to all users.
mncDwgBase.r2: Therefore, try to follow the recommendations:
mncDwgBase.r3: The added block should be useful in the work. No matter what professional orientation it will be
mncDwgBase.r4: Do not use a wide variety of layers in the blocks, if this is not necessary. The best option is to use the standard layers of the ModPlus plugin
mncDwgBase.r5: If the block is dynamic, then perhaps it is not necessary to add attributes for the specification
mncDwgBase.r6: Let the blocks understandable names and descriptions, so that the user does not have to guess what it is and why
mncDwgBase.r7: If you took a block from some resource, then be sure to specify the source!
mncDwgBase.r8: Do not be lazy to think over the path to the block in the database
mncDwgBase.r10: The default plugin assumes that the drawings added to the local (user) database will be added to the global database, which is accessible to all users.
mncDwgBase.r11: Therefore, some restrictions are added to the attached drawings:
mncDwgBase.r13: In the attached drawing, Proxy primitives should not be used
mncDwgBase.r14: Drawings made in poor quality (for example, with multileaders from lines and text, etc.) will not be taken to the public database
mncDwgBase.r15: Also try to follow the recommendations:
mncDwgBase.r16: Do not use a wide variety of layers in the drawings, if this is not necessary. The best option is to use the standard layers of the ModPlus plugin
mncDwgBase.r17: Do not use a large number of annotation styles in your drawings. The best option is to use the annotations styles of the ModPlus plugin
mncDwgBase.r18: Do not use line types in drawings that are not standard for nanoCAD
mncDwgBase.r19: Do not use fonts that are not part of the standard nanoCAD font set in drawings
mncDwgBase.r20: If you took a drawing from some resource, then be sure to specify the source!
mncDwgBase.r21: Do not be lazy to think over the way to the drawing in the database
mncDwgBase.pp1: It is assumed that you have selected a block in a file that is not yet located in the ModPlus/Data/DwgBase directory. Therefore, you must either specify a file previously created in the ModPlus/Data/DwgBase directory to place blocks in it, or create this file. The selected block will be copied to the specified file.
mncDwgBase.pp2: If you add several blocks with a common orientation (for example, blocks of floor slabs), then create one file for them. You do not need to create a separate file for each block!
mncDwgBase.pp3: Files in the root of the ModPlus/Data/DwgBase folder can not be created! Create subfolders in it (for example, ModPlus/Data/DwgBase/Floor slabs).
mncDwgBase.pp4: If you created a file with blocks, put it in the folder DwgBase and now add blocks from the file to the database, check the "Current file" check box.
mncDwgBase.pp5: The field is filled in according to your wish
mncDwgBase.pp6: P.S. We are very happy for you, if you have an original and beautiful Nick, but try all the same to write Surname and First Name
mncDwgBase.pp7: If you are not the author of the block, then indicate the source from where this block was taken, so as not to offend its creator
mncDwgBase.pp8: The conditional path to the block in the directory that forms the structure of the tree
mncDwgBase.pp9: For example, the path "Блоки/Каталог1/Каталог2/Каталог3" will yield the following result:
mncDwgBase.pp10: Each conditional sub directory must be separated by a "/"
mncDwgBase.pp11: Adding attributes for the specifications to the block
mncDwgBase.pp12: Attributes will be added to the block when it is inserted by this plugin.
mncDwgBase.pp13: All attributes will be invisible. You can change their value in the block properties after inserting.
mncDwgBase.pp14: You can fill in the default values.
mncDwgBase.pp16: Specify the default values for the attributes. These values will be added to the block when it is inserted.
mncDwgBase.pp17: By default, the values of the attributes that were set as the "default value" when the attribute is created are populated. You can fill the attribute values with the values of the currently selected block.
mncDwgBase.pp19: To add to the database, the file must be saved in nanoCAD 2013 version!
mncDwgBase.pp20: If you have already located the file in the subfolder of the ModPlus/Data/DwgBase folder, then you can "Select" it.
mncDwgBase.pp21: If the drawing file is not located in the subfolder of the ModPlus/Data/DwgBase folder, then you can "Copy" it to it.
mncDwgBase.pp22: If you are adding an open drawing currently located in the subfolder of the ModPlus/Data/DwgBase folder, check the "Current file" check box.
mncDwgBase.pp23: The name of the drawing that is displayed in the plugin window
mncDwgBase.pp25: Who added the drawing to the dwg database
mncDwgBase.pp26: If you are not the author of the drawing, then indicate the source from where this drawing was taken, so as not to offend its creator
mncDwgBase.pp27: The conditional path to the drawing in the directory that forms the structure of the tree
mncDwgBase.u1: UTILITIES OF THE DWG USER BASE
mncDwgBase.u8: Select several elements in the list (check the boxes) for which you want to change the "Path" in the database. Specify a new value for "Path" and click "Apply"
mncDwgBase.u13: New "Path" for the specified elements of the database:
mncDwgBase.u14: Select several elements in the list (check the boxes) for which you want to change "Source" and "Added by". Specify a new value for "Source" and "Added by" and click "Apply" (Leave the field blank if you do not want to change the value)
mncDwgBase.u15: Unused files are files located in the directory
mncDwgBase.u16: that are not referenced by any element in databases (plug-in base and user database)
mncDwgBase.u19: Also, images for these files and .bak files will be deleted
mncDwgBase.u20: Elements without a source file are elements in the user database that reference a non-existent source file
mncDwgBase.u25: You can not specify only the main group!
mncDwgBase.u27: Attention! The changes you made can not be undone!\nContinue?
mncDwgBase.u39: Blocks that have attributes for the specification:
mncDwgBase.u42: Existing dwg files used by the database:
mncDwgBase.u44: invalid references were found. Those. source files are missing!
mncDwgBase.u46: The selected files will be permanently deleted!\nContinue?
mncDwgBase.u49: Files can not be accessed. Perhaps they are open
mncDwgBase.u51: The selected items will be deleted irrevocably!\nContinue?
mncDwgBase.u53: Specify at least one value ("Source" or "Added by") to replace
mncDwgBase.u55: Select one of the database files in the list, specify a new file name without an extension, and click "Apply"
mncDwgBase.u58: You did not specify a new file name
mncDwgBase.u59: The file name can not contain the following characters:
mncDwgBase.u60: Can not access the file. Maybe it's open
